summary: iOS 👀 Free60+/20 | Image missing on Home Screen
scenario: Headset image missing from Poly Studio Mobile app Home Screen for Voyager Free 60+ and Voyager Free 20 devices
description_clean: Headset image is missing from the Poly Studio Mobile app Home Screen for Poly Voyager Free 60+ and Poly Voyager Free 20 devices. No placeholder image is displayed on the test builds, while two placeholder images appear side by side on the production app.
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Ensure a Poly Voyager Free 60+ or Poly Voyager Free 20 device is paired and connected.
Navigate to the Home screen of the app.
Observe the device card area where the headset image is displayed.
expected: The correct headset image for the connected Poly Voyager Free 60+ or Poly Voyager Free 20 device should be displayed on the Home screen. If the image is not available, a single placeholder image should be shown.
actual: No headset image is displayed on the Home screen for Poly Voyager Free 60+ and Poly Voyager Free 20 devices on test builds. On the production app, two placeholder images appear side by side instead of the correct headset image.
